label: fabricated
reason: This purported EPA rule cites a future Federal Register date, references no real rulemaking docket, and describes a radical CWA Section 404 exemption that has never been proposed or published.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 97
REASON: This document describes a rule that does not exist — no such EPA Final Rule 2026-03 has been published, the Federal Register citation is from the future, and the substance (allowing filling of wetlands up to 1 acre with no Corps notification) would represent a radical departure from CWA Section 404 that has never been proposed; the formatting and specificity are designed to appear authentic but the content is invented.
